description_long: This is a large, white plastic bottle with a black cow-print pattern covering its surface, reminiscent of dairy product packaging. The front features a blue and white label with the brand 'Naturaphy' and product details, including 'Hair & body wash with milk proteins.' The bottle has a cylindrical shape with a slightly contoured body for grip and a rounded shoulder leading up to a screw-on cap. The lower portion of the bottle is encircled by a blue band, adding a visual accent. The back label contains detailed product information, ingredients, and barcodes, typical of commercial personal care products. The overall design is eye-catching and playful, likely intended to evoke a sense of freshness and nourishment.
description: A large, white plastic bottle with a black cow-print pattern, blue accents, and a screw-on cap, labeled as a 'Hair & body wash with milk proteins' by Naturaphy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cow-print pattern, blue label with product and brand details, and the screw-on cap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the cow-print pattern and the bottle's contoured shape, with minimal label visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detailed product information, ingredients, barcode, and the blue band at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cow-print pattern and the bottle's ergonomic contour, with partial label visibility.
attribute_product_name: Hair & body wash with milk proteins
